root_text.an3.46:1.1: “Yaṁ, bhikkhave, sīlavanto pabbajitā gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā upanissāya viharanti.
root_text.an3.46:1.2: Tattha manussā tīhi ṭhānehi bahuṁ puññaṁ pasavanti.
root_text.an3.46:1.5: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, sīlavanto pabbajitā gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā upanissāya viharanti.
root_text.an3.46:1.6: Tattha manussā imehi tīhi ṭhānehi bahuṁ puññaṁ pasavantī”ti.

translation_text.an3.46:1.1: “Mendicants, when ethical renunciates are supported by a town or village,
translation_text.an3.46:1.2: the people there brim with much merit in three ways.
translation_text.an3.46:1.4: By way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.46:1.5: When ethical renunciates are supported by a town or village,
translation_text.an3.46:1.6: the people there brim with much merit in these three ways.”
